use_cases: Triggering form submissions with primary or destructive actions
Navigation via link-style buttons with underline hover states
Creating toolbars with icon-only buttons for compact UI
Building modal dialogs with ghost or outline button variants
Accessible focus management with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Supports disabled states, asChild composition pattern, and includes focus-visible ring accessibility features. Designed as a foundational atomic component for any UI system.
